title: Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Mizoram

overview.short: Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the Siaha district of Mizoram, India.
overview.description: Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the Siaha district of Mizoram, India. Established on October 1, 2007, under the administration of the Mara Autonomous District Council (MADC), it spans 250 km2 of moist deciduous and semi-evergreen forests. Situated near the Indo-Myanmar border at an altitude of 700 to 940 meters, the sanctuary is a critical biodiversity hotspot. It supports rare fauna including the Clouded Leopard (Neofelis nebulosa), Hoolock Gibbon, and Phayre's leaf monkey, and it has a rich diversity of butterflies.

topPlaces.name: Kaisi Tlang
topPlaces.description: Kaisi Thlang is a mountain range in Matupi Township in Myanmar's Chin State. It is the northern part of Matupi and Amsol village, inside the Sizo tribal territory.

items.note: Kaisi Thlang is a mountain range in Matupi Township in Myanmar's Chin State. It is the northern part of Matupi and Amsol village, inside the Sizo tribal territory.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lengpui Airport, Aizawl (203 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (264 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tokalo Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaisi Tlang.
